label: UltraCompress architectural-compression public evidence matrix
availability: v0.2 (Q3 2026) — evidence now, customer-shippable artifacts in v0.2
important_disclaimer: This matrix is the architectural-compression experiment only. README headline numbers (95.63% T1 retention at 2.798 bpw, zero catastrophic failures, 30% smaller than NF4) are the weight-level method — a separate experiment, separate operating point, separate availability. Do not combine retention numbers across methods as a single quality curve.

provenance.extraction_method: direct copy of public-safe fields only; method internals (operating-point parameters, codebook sizes, calibration constants) deliberately excluded

field_definitions.track: compression track — A (post-training quantization) or B (architectural compression)
field_definitions.availability: when the customer-shippable artifact reaches Hugging Face Hub
field_definitions.customer_ship_status: is this an artifact a customer can download today, or evidence-only
field_definitions.bpw: bits per weight; effective on-disk per-parameter cost including all overhead
field_definitions.compression_ratio_vs_fp16: compressed-artifact size relative to FP16 baseline; >1.0 means smaller
field_definitions.ppl_fp16: WikiText-103 perplexity of the FP16 teacher
field_definitions.ppl_compressed: WikiText-103 perplexity of the compressed model at this operating point
field_definitions.t1_teacher_pct: top-1 accuracy of the FP16 teacher on the calibration eval (percentage points)
field_definitions.t10_teacher_pct: top-10 accuracy of the FP16 teacher (percentage points)
field_definitions.t1_compressed_pct: top-1 accuracy of the compressed model (percentage points)
field_definitions.t10_compressed_pct: top-10 accuracy of the compressed model (percentage points)
field_definitions.t1_agreement_pct: fraction of tokens where compressed top-1 = teacher top-1
field_definitions.t10_agreement_pct: fraction of tokens where compressed top-1 is within teacher top-10
field_definitions.t1_retention_pct: compressed_t1 / teacher_t1 expressed as a percentage
field_definitions.t10_retention_pct: compressed_t10 / teacher_t10 expressed as a percentage

notes: All numeric values are direct field copies from the source archive; no hand-entered values.
Family labels for OLMo-2 and SmolLM2 corrected from the upstream archive's incorrect 'Llama-2' label.
Method-internal fields (operating-point parameters, codebook sizes, calibration constants) are deliberately excluded.
Models that ran the agreement/retention pipeline but not the perplexity pipeline have null ppl_* fields.
